; --- globals ---
@.fmt.int_println = private unnamed_addr constant [4 x i8] c"%d\0A\00", align 1
@.str.0 = private unnamed_addr constant [4 x i8] c"yes\00", align 1
@.str.false = private unnamed_addr constant [6 x i8] c"false\00", align 1
@.str.true = private unnamed_addr constant [5 x i8] c"true\00", align 1

; --- declarations ---
declare i32 @puts(ptr)

; --- definitions ---
; @main
define i32 @main() {
entry:
  %t0 = add i32 0, 1
  %t1 = add i32 0, 1
  %t2 = sub i32 %t1, %t0
  %t4 = trunc i32 %t2 to i1
  %t5 = select i1 %t4, ptr @.str.true, ptr @.str.false
  call i32 @puts(ptr %t5)
  %t7 = add i32 0, 0
  %t8 = add i32 0, 1
  %t9 = sub i32 %t8, %t7
  %t11 = trunc i32 %t9 to i1
  %t12 = select i1 %t11, ptr @.str.true, ptr @.str.false
  call i32 @puts(ptr %t12)
  %t14 = add i32 0, 5
  %t15 = add i32 0, 3
  %t16 = icmp sgt i32 %t14, %t15
  %t17 = add i32 0, 1
  %t18 = sub i32 %t17, %t16
  %t20 = trunc i32 %t18 to i1
  %t21 = select i1 %t20, ptr @.str.true, ptr @.str.false
  call i32 @puts(ptr %t21)
  %t23 = add i32 0, 0
  %t24 = add i32 0, 1
  %t25 = sub i32 %t24, %t23
  %t26 = trunc i32 %t25 to i1
  br i1 %t26, label %bb1, label %bb2
bb1:
  call i32 @puts(ptr @.str.0)
  br label %bb3
bb2:
  br label %bb3
bb3:
  ret i32 0
}
